sections.instruction: Complete the notes below. Write ONE WORD ONLY.
sections.passage_or_context: Studying geography helps us to understand: • The effects of different processes on the {{BLANK}} of the Earth • The dynamic between {{BLANK}} and population Two main branches of study: • Physical features • Human lifestyles and their {{BLANK}} Specific study areas: • Biophysical, topographic, political, social, economic, historical and {{BLANK}} geography and also cartography Key point: • Geography helps us to understand our surroundings and the associated {{BLANK}} What do the geographers do? • Find data e.g. conduct censuses, collect information in the form of {{BLANK}} using computer and satellite technology • Analyse data – identify {{BLANK}} e.g. cause and effect • Publish findings in the form of: o Maps  Easy to carry  Can show physical features of large and small areas  But a two-dimensional map will always have some {{BLANK}} o Aerial photos  Can show vegetation problems {{BLANK}} density, ocean, floor etc. o Landsat pictures sent to receiving stations  Used for monitoring {{BLANK}} conditions etc.
